TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Tpuqu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 543 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku83%, Tayan4%, Amis2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tpuqu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tpuqu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tpuqu hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Tpuqu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tpuqu hya' ga Tkijig. tay mkyahu' na Tpuqu hya' ga Bsuring. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tpuqu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku**%, tajan*%, amis~ɕ*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa tkijiɣ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕuriŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Tpuqu ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Syurin go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 155 buwan, 543 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 22 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Truku83%, Tayan4%, Amis2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 6%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tpuqu hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Tpuqu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Tpuqu hya' ga bsilung. tay mkraya' na Tpuqu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tpuqu hya' ga Tkijig. tay mkyahu' na Tpuqu hya' ga Bsuring. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tpuqu ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu s~ɕjurin ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, truku**%, tajan*%, amis~ɕ*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa tkijiɣ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tpuqu ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕuriŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
